title: Rasaathi En Usuru Lyrics Thiruda Thiruda
stanzas:
Rasaathi
en usuru ennuthilla.
poochoodi
vaakkapattu porapulla.
nee pona
en udambu mannukkulla.
raavodu
seithi varum vaadipulla.

thaara veettu thinnaiyila
karikkum manjal araikkayila.
manjala araikkum munne
manasa arichavalae.

karisakaattu oadaiyila
kandaangi thuvakkaiyila.
thuniya nenaiya vittu
manasa puzhinjavalae

Nalla kalaththu maettil
enna izhuthu mudinjikittu
poravalae..
porava porava thaan
buththi kettu ponavathaan

naan thantha malligaiya
nattaaththil potu vittu
arali poo choodi azhuthapadi
poravalae.

kadala kaattukulla
kai adichi sonna pulla.
kaathula ezhuthanum
pombalainga sonna solla.(2)

Rasaathi
en usuru ennuthilla.
poochoodi
vaakkapattu porapulla.
nee pona
en udambu mannukkulla.
raavodu
seithi varum vaadipulla.

thottu thottu pottu vachcha
chuttu viral kaayalaiye.
marikozhundhu vachcha kaiyil
vaasam innum pogalaye

Marudhaiyil vaangi thandha
valavi valaiyalaiye
malluvetti maththiyila
manja kara maaralaiye

andha kazhuthu thaemalaiyum
kadhoram machchathaiyum
paarpatheppoo..
paarpathu paarpatheppo
pournamiyum vaarathu eppo.

andha kolusu mani sirippum
kumari ilanjiruppum
kaetpatheppo
kaetpathu kaetpatheppo
keera thandu poopatheppo

karuvelanga kaattkulla
karachaang kuruvi onnu
shruthi maari kaththuthamma
thunaiyathaan kaanomunnu

kadala kaattukulla
kai adichi sonna pulla.
kaathula ezhuthanum
pombalainga sonna solla.(2)

Rasaathi
en usuru ennuthilla.
poochoodi
vaakkapattu porapulla.
nee pona
en udambu mannukkulla.
raavodu
seithi varum vaadipulla.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Rasaathi En Usuru expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting the emotional turmoil of separation.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Thiruda Thiruda, the song captures a pivotal moment of romance, enhancing the narrative of love and desire.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Shahul Hameed, known for his emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Rasaathi En Usuru was composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman.

When was this song released?

This song was released on November 13, 1993.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Rasaathi En Usuru, the protagonist expresses profound feelings of love and yearning, encapsulating the essence of romantic longing. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an emotional atmosphere that resonates with anyone who has experienced love. As part of the film Thiruda Thiruda, it enhances the narrative by portraying the complexities of relationships. This classic track remains a beloved favorite, evoking nostalgia and deep emotions in listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rasaathi En Usuru from the movie Thiruda Thiruda is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Shahul Hameed's soulful voice and A.R. Rahman's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional depth and lyrical beauty that make this track a classic in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: My beloved, you are my life. When you leave, my body becomes dust. When you go, news will come at night.
My beloved, you are my life.
In the house of the stars, there is a golden turmeric plant. Before the turmeric blooms, my heart is already aware.
In the dress of the wind, I saw the beauty of the sky. My heart has spilled out of the thoughts of the past.
In the good time, I will leave after finishing my work. The person who leaves is the one who has gained wisdom.
In the marriage tradition, the tears will flow. The person who leaves is the one who has become precious.
I planted the jasmine in the garden and let it bloom beautifully.
In the sea, if a child speaks, it will be written in the sky. (2)
My beloved, you are my life. When you leave, my body becomes dust. When you go, news will come at night.
My beloved, you are my life.
Touching and placing, the fingers will be around. The fragrance that was held will not go away yet.
The branch that was brought from the forest has a beautiful trap. The golden fish will not escape from the net.
That beautiful flower and the sound of the bells, will they be heard? Will they be heard? Will the flowers bloom?
In the forest, the bird sings a tune, and the sound of the flute will be heard.
In the sea, if a child speaks, it will be written in the sky. (2)
My beloved, you are my life. When you leave, my body becomes dust. When you go, news will come at night.
My beloved, you are my life.
